summary: The diff implements REQ-2 (banned/suspended error screens) and REQ-3 (YouTube OAuth fix) well. REQ-1 (remove role-based restrictions) is partially addressed — the App.tsx no longer shows role-gating in the visible portion, but there is no explicit evidence that role-based checks were removed from individual YouTube-related components (ChannelConnection, VideoUrlForm, YouTubePlayer, ClipSuggestions, ClipTimestampControls, ClipList).

missing_requirements.requirement: Remove any role-based access restrictions from YouTube-related features. All authenticated users regardless of role must be able to see and use ChannelConnection, VideoUrlForm, YouTubePlayer, ClipSuggestions, ClipTimestampControls, and ClipList.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff does not show changes to the individual YouTube-related components to remove role-based access checks. The frontend-file-summaries.txt entries for these components do not mention removal of role checks. While App.tsx renders these components, it does not confirm that role guards inside the components themselves were removed.

hallucinated_features.description: A backend migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added, providing a no-op migration function.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention adding a migration module to the backend. This is an extra file not requested by any requirement.
